assertions.expectation: Recommends upgrading the L4 inference pool and A100 pool separately with different strategies
assertions.reason: Response clearly recommends sequential upgrades with Phase 2 for L4 pool and Phase 3 for A100 pool, with different timing considerations for each

assertions.expectation: For L4 inference pool: recommends surge upgrade with maxSurge=1 or 2 to maintain capacity during rolling replacement
assertions.reason: Response recommends autoscaled blue-green upgrade for L4 pool, not surge upgrade with maxSurge settings

assertions.expectation: Addresses GPU driver version compatibility — auto-installed drivers must be compatible with inference framework (TensorRT, vLLM, etc.)
assertions.reason: Response addresses GPU driver compatibility, mentioning CUDA version changes and ML framework compatibility checks in pre-upgrade checklist and monitoring sections

assertions.expectation: For A100 fine-tuning pool: recommends scheduling the upgrade during a gap between fine-tuning jobs
assertions.reason: Response explicitly states 'Start only during a gap between fine-tuning jobs' and includes commands to verify no active fine-tuning jobs before upgrade

assertions.expectation: Notes that GPU VMs do not support live migration — inference pods will restart during node upgrade, causing brief latency spikes
assertions.reason: Response does not explicitly mention that GPU VMs don't support live migration or that inference pods will restart causing latency spikes

assertions.expectation: Recommends PDBs on inference deployments to ensure enough replicas stay available during the rolling upgrade
assertions.reason: Response includes PDBs in the pre-upgrade checklist: 'PDBs configured for inference workloads (allow some disruption but prevent mass eviction)'

assertions.expectation: Addresses auto-scaler interaction — new nodes created by auto-scaler during upgrade will be at the old version until their pool upgrade completes
assertions.reason: Response mentions auto-scaler configuration but does not specifically address that new nodes created during upgrade will be at old version until pool upgrade completes

assertions.expectation: Recommends testing driver + CUDA compatibility in staging before production upgrade
assertions.reason: Response explicitly recommends 'Test in staging first - verify CUDA version changes don't break your ML pipelines' and includes staging compatibility checks in the checklist
